title: IdentityIntakeInvalid
description: Event: `identity_intake_invalid`. Emitted when a `submit_identity_intake` action carried values that failed server-side validation (missing required field, malformed email, unparseable phone). The turn REMAINS parked — the client should re-render the intake form with the per-field errors and let the visitor resubmit. Mirrors `otp_invalid`: invalid input is a retryable state, never a terminal `error` event.

requestId.description: Echoes the `requestId` of the parked turn (same correlation as the `identity_intake_required` event).
The request ID this intake belongs to.

message.description: Human-readable validation message for this field.
Human-readable summary suitable for a form-level error line.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the event was emitted.
